news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. The upgrade will enable stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展了多链生态连接能力。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 for Lower Fees
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，计划采用ZK-Rollup Layer2技术降低小额转账手续费，提升网络效率。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation’s research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing transaction fees for micro-payments.
